items.claim: Cory Sandhagen is more well-rounded than Mario Bautista.
items.quote: I do feel like he he's a little bit more about well-rounded

items.claim: Cory Sandhagen has fought tougher competition at the top of the division.
items.quote: he's also fought the tougher competition at the top.

items.claim: Cory Sandhagen has never shown a problem on the ground.
items.quote: I've never seen Cory have a problem on the ground.

items.claim: Aljamain Sterling was able to take Cory Sandhagen down and submit him.
items.quote: Aljo, you know, Aljo took him down with a backpack and then subbed him.

items.claim: Cory Sandhagen maintains a great pace in his fights.
items.quote: he can keep a great pace.

items.claim: Cory Sandhagen's movement, angles, and footwork are high-level.
items.quote: His angles and footwork are really good

items.claim: Cory Sandhagen constantly improves as a fighter.
Mario Bautista is a strong grappler.
items.quote: He's a fantastic grappler. He's very strong there

items.claim: Mario Bautista is on a winning streak.
items.quote: He's been on on a streak right now
